en.text: a prolonged form of a compound probably of a derivative of the base of G1476 and perhaps G2192; properly, keeping one's seat (sedentary), i.e. (by implication) still (undisturbed, undisturbing)

senses.gloss_en: a prolonged form of a compound probably of a derivative of the base of G1476 and perhaps G2192; properly, keeping one's seat (sedentary), i.e. (by implication) still (undisturbed, undisturbing)
